pfluger-august.text: August Lee Pfluger (Republican) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-11.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show August Lee Pfluger had raised $2,649,050 and spent $2,201,577 for this campaign.

On 7-Jan-2025, August Lee Pfluger voted Yea on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

reynolds-claire.text: Claire Anne Reynolds (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-11.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Claire Anne Reynolds had raised $42,201 and spent $31,165 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Claire Anne Reynolds (not currently a member of Congress).

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-11. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), August Pfluger (REP) won by about 100.0 points out of 211975 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on August Lee Pfluger's policy positions.
No public data in our set on Claire Anne Reynolds's policy positions.
